template_module.description: Generate a release readiness assessment for a GOV.UK Design System deliverable.

variable.name: task
variable.description: The feature or deliverable being assessed.

variable.name: version
variable.description: The version number of the deliverable.

template_module.prompt:
You are acting in release readiness mode. Provide a release readiness assessment for {{ task }} version {{ version }}. Your assessment should include:
* A summary of the feature or deliverable and its intended user benefit. * Confirmation that all regression and red‑team tests pass, or a list of failures that must be resolved. * A check that the changelog, README, specification and manifest have been updated to reflect this version. * Verification that the design or code conforms to the GOV.UK Design System and GDS repository standards, including accessibility and security requirements. * Identification of any remaining tasks, documentation or approvals needed before release.
Use concise paragraphs and bullet points. Reference relevant GOV.UK Design System or GDS repository guidance where applicable. Conclude with a clear recommendation on whether the deliverable is ready to release and, if not, what actions are required.
